entries.zhHans: 以寿元为火，以五行为刃。
五行灵根构筑，决定你这一局能走多远。
entries.en: Build around elemental roots and decide how far this run can go.

entries.zhHans: 自动战斗，策略重心放在配装、路线与功法取舍。
entries.en: Auto battles keep the focus on loadouts

entries.zhHans: 寿元会随着推进不断流逝，每一步都在逼近终局。
进入主菜单后可继续推进地图、战斗与构筑。
entries.en: Enter the main menu to continue your route

entries.zhHans: 这一版先只用文字、线条和矩形框，方便后续替换美术。
entries.en: This version uses text lines and rectangles first so art can be replaced later.

entries.zhHans: 战斗配置缺失，请先导入全部 CSV。
entries.en: Battle config missing. Import all CSV files first.

entries.zhHans: 角色甲  HP 120/120角色乙  HP 150/150
敌人甲  HP 100/100敌人乙  HP 90/90
下一步这里会接真实战斗日志。
entries.en: This area will show real battle logs in the next step.

entries.zhHans: 这是第一阶段的 UGUI 框架，后面可以把这些线框替换成正式美术。
entries.en: This popup is part of the first-phase UGUI framework. These boxes can be replaced by final art later.

entries.zhHans: 下一步会接入真正的战斗系统。
entries.en: The real battle system will be connected next.

entries.zhHans: 该功能仅在Unity编辑器中可用。
entries.en: This feature is only available in the Unity Editor.
Lifespan exhausted. The run has ended.

entries.zhHans: 本轮路线完成，返回标题。
建议：如果预估不理想，先调整装备再开战。
entries.en: Tip: Adjust equipment before battle if the preview looks risky.
The destination event has been triggered.

entries.zhHans: 长途跋涉之后，你可以在此调息、采气，或整理下一段行程所需。
entries.en: Choose how to spend this stop.

entries.zhHans: 借阅藏经获得 1 次功法机缘
离山入世之前，你可以在村中做最后一轮整备与取舍。
entries.en: Before leaving the village, choose one piece of support.

entries.zhHans: 你循着地脉残息采得数枚灵石，行囊因此宽裕了几分。
entries.en: You gather the local five-element crystals and leave with fuller pockets.

entries.zhHans: 你手中的对应灵石不足，暂时无法进行这次炼化。
entries.en: You do not have enough matching spirit stones to refine this stop.

entries.zhHans: 你就地炼化随身灵石，将零散积蓄硬生生催成一截修为。
entries.en: You refine stored spirit stones into pure progress and push your cultivation further.

entries.zhHans: 你收束气息、整饬囊中器物，为接下来的险路腾出余地。
entries.en: You sort equipment and steady your rhythm before moving on.

entries.zhHans: 你静坐运转周天，心息渐定，修为也随之稳稳推进。
entries.en: You focus on breathing practice and deepen your cultivation.

entries.zhHans: 村中行商替你补齐了赶路所需，免去一段仓促狼狈。
entries.en: A passing merchant leaves you a small bundle of cultivation supplies.

entries.zhHans: 临行之前，老修士点破了你几处行气滞涩之处。
entries.en: The village elder gives you a few words of guidance before you set out.

entries.zhHans: 选择一项开局功法机缘。
你整理思绪后，轻装上路。
entries.en: You leave the village with a clearer mind.

entries.zhHans: 你从村中藏经阁借得一页功法残卷。
entries.en: You borrow a manual from the village archive.

entries.zhHans: 你在本轮途中寿元耗尽。当前局将结束，并返回主界面。
entries.en: Your lifespan has run out during this journey. The current run will end and return to the main menu.

entries.zhHans: 立刻触发休整事件，并停留在地图上。
entries.en: Trigger rest immediately and stay on the map.

entries.zhHans: 移动结束后自动进入战斗。
entries.en: Start battle automatically after movement ends.

entries.zhHans: 摊棚杂陈、人声纷乱，你可以拿灵石换资源，也可以借此稳住行程节奏。
entries.en: Trade spirit stones for resources here

entries.zhHans: 你以手中灵石换得一件合手法器，顺势也稳住了自身气机。
entries.en: You trade your spirit stones for a fitting relic and stabilize your cultivation a bit.

entries.zhHans: 你把路上缺的药散与符纸补齐，接下来的推进也重新顺了起来。
entries.en: You restock what you need for the road and smooth out your run tempo.

entries.zhHans: 从摊位上的几页残卷里挑一份带走。
entries.en: Choose one manual from the incomplete pages on the stall.

entries.zhHans: 你从旧摊深处换来一页残卷，其中隐约藏着一门可用法诀。
entries.en: You trade for a torn manual page from the market stall.

entries.zhHans: 你翻遍摊位，也没遇到真正契合当前路数的机缘。
静室隔绝外扰，最适合在大战之前做一次更彻底的取舍与凝练。
entries.en: This is your last stop before the boss

entries.zhHans: 你借静室灵机凝练道基，将散乱修为重新锻成一截实打实的突破。
entries.en: You force your foundation tighter with spirit stones and secure a sharper cultivation jump.

entries.zhHans: 你开启尘封遗藏，补到一件可用器物与一段临战储备。
entries.en: You open the sanctum cache and come away with gear and a bit of battle stock.

entries.zhHans: 从这一次顿悟里定下一门最终要诀。
entries.en: Choose the technique that crystallizes from this moment of insight.

entries.zhHans: 你在静室中沉心片刻，终于从纷乱念头里捞起一线更高阶的法门。
entries.en: A brief retreat inside the sanctum reveals a higher-tier skill opportunity.

entries.zhHans: 这一次闭关并未迎来新悟，只留下一瞬格外澄明的心境。
entries.en: This retreat brings no new revelation

entries.zhHans: 获得 1 次高阶功法机缘
获得 1 次顶阶功法机缘
村中铁匠只借你整备器物，此处不产资源，但足够你把装备理顺。
entries.en: This stop offers preparation only. You can reorganize your equipment here without gaining direct rewards.

entries.zhHans: 祠前石阶适合温习旧法，此处不直接给奖励，但能帮你重新梳理本局功法。
entries.en: This stop is for reviewing skills only. You can inspect learned techniques here without gaining direct rewards.

entries.zhHans: 村口石碑记着前路诸险，此处不产出奖励，但能帮你重新判断节奏。
entries.en: This fixed waypoint helps you review the route and pacing. It does not grant direct rewards.

entries.zhHans: 此地会随机触发一段机缘，触发后需等待冷却恢复。
entries.en: A random opportunity may trigger here and must recover after its cooldown.

entries.zhHans: 牙行最擅长把压箱底的库存换成眼下能派上用场的筹码。
entries.en: A broker stop for turning stored spirit stones into immediate power.

entries.zhHans: 你把一批灵石折价炼化，虽然吃了亏，却换来立刻可用的修为推进。
entries.en: You refine a batch of stones at a discount and turn it into steady cultivation growth.

entries.zhHans: 你自牙行收来一份旧藏，把器物与路资都补整齐了些。
entries.en: You acquire a hidden cache from the broker and round out your gear and travel stock.

entries.zhHans: 从这批流转而来的残卷里挑一份带走。
entries.en: Choose one manual from the circulating fragments.

entries.zhHans: 你从牙行竞下一卷旧法残篇，其中竟真有可堪一用的高阶机缘。
entries.en: You win a higher-tier skill fragment from the broker.

entries.zhHans: 这一批残卷虽然名头不小，却没有一门真正合你眼下路数。
entries.en: None of the broker manuals fit your build this time.

entries.zhHans: 熔炉最适合孤注一掷的决断，你可以在此换来一次更锋利也更冒险的跃升。
entries.en: A sprint-focused stop where you trade current resources for a more aggressive power spike.

entries.zhHans: 你借熔炉烈势淬炼筋骨，硬生生把这一程的成长再往上拔了一截。
entries.en: You force a body-tempering session through the forge and gain a sharper growth spike.

entries.zhHans: 你打开炉中旧藏，从中补到一件器物与几分临战余裕。
entries.en: You open the forge cache and gain gear opportunity plus battle stock.

entries.zhHans: 从熔炉异象里定下一门更高阶的法诀。
entries.en: Choose the stronger technique revealed by the forge omen.

entries.zhHans: 你从熔炉异象里截住一缕真火意念，凝成一门顶阶法诀的雏形。
entries.en: You seize a top-tier skill opportunity from the forge omen.

entries.zhHans: 这次炉象虽然壮阔，却没真正留下能为你所用的新法。
entries.en: This forge omen leaves no new technique behind.

entries.zhHans: 当前无法读取功法数据。
下一步：回到地图，准备前往第 {0} 关。
entries.en: Next: Return to the map and prepare for Stage {0}.

entries.zhHans: 下一步：回到地图，从第 {0} 关重新整备。
entries.en: Next: Return to the map and regroup from Stage {0}.

entries.zhHans: 从第 1 关开始新一轮
entries.en: Start a new run from Stage 1

entries.zhHans: 从第 1 关开始新一轮试炼。
entries.en: Start a new run from Stage 1.

entries.zhHans: 先完成或反复整备第 {0} 关，再决定是否继续前进。
entries.en: Clear or prepare around Stage {0} before moving on.

entries.zhHans: 标准战斗节点，可获得修为、灵石与装备掉落。
entries.en: Standard battle node with cultivation, spirit stones, and equipment rewards.

entries.zhHans: 精英战斗节点，敌人更强，但奖励品质更高。
entries.en: Elite battle node with stronger enemies and better rewards.

entries.zhHans: 休整节点，用来调整资源、节奏与临战状态。
entries.en: Rest node for adjusting resources, pacing, and battle readiness.

entries.zhHans: 首领战节点，胜利后可推进当前章节。
entries.en: Boss battle node. Victory advances the current chapter.

entries.zhHans: 你顺着偶然显化的气运收拢机缘，换来一段平稳却扎实的增益。
entries.en: You ride the passing fortune into a steady gain of cultivation and spirit stones.

entries.zhHans: 你在残痕旧址里翻出一份遗藏，顺手补到器物与些许路资。
entries.en: You uncover a forgotten cache along the road and come away with gear plus a little stock.

entries.zhHans: 你抓住一闪而逝的灵感，将它勉强凝成一次更高阶的功法机缘。
entries.en: You seize a fleeting flash of insight and turn it into a higher-tier skill opportunity.

entries.zhHans: 这缕机缘来得快散得也快，终究没有留下真正成形的法门。
entries.en: This opportunity fades quickly and leaves no new technique behind.

entries.zhHans: 这处随机机缘刚刚触发过，还需要再等待 {0} 个月才会恢复。
entries.en: This random opportunity was triggered recently. It will recover in {0} month(s).

entries.zhHans: 按五行相生，将一种灵石炼化为下一相灵石。
entries.en: Refine one spirit stone into the next generating element.

entries.zhHans: 点击任意一系灵石，按相生规则进行转换。
entries.en: Select any spirit stone and convert it along the generating cycle.

entries.zhHans: 当前灵石不足，无法完成本次转换。
entries.en: Not enough spirit stones for this conversion.
Cast when self HP is below {0}%
Cast when an ally HP is below {0}%
Cast when enemy count is at least {0}
Cast when target HP is below {0}%
Cast when target HP is above {0}%
Cast when self has no shield
Cast when target has a shield

entries.zhHans: 点击屏幕任意位置跳过
山门之外，五行地脉已现紊乱之兆。有人说这是天时将变，也有人说，这是某场更大试炼的前声。你在寿元缓缓流逝的当下启程，所能依靠的，只有尚未磨灭的道心与眼前这条未必正确的路。
entries.en: Beyond the mountain gate, the five elemental veins have already begun to falter. Some call it a shift in heaven's timing, others the prelude to a greater trial. You set out while your lifespan is already slipping away, with only your unbroken resolve and a road that may not be the right one.

entries.zhHans: 自今日起，前路不会再替你放缓脚步。先看清地图、功法与装备，再决定把时间花在什么地方。
entries.en: From this day on, the road will not slow itself for you. Study the route, the techniques, and your equipment first, then decide where your time is worth spending.

entries.zhHans: 若时间本就有限，我便不想把每一步都走得含混。先求活，再求看得更远。
entries.en: If time is already limited, then I will not spend each step in confusion. First I survive, then I learn to see farther.

entries.zhHans: 记住，强大从不是白得的。你每一次停留、每一次争夺、每一次绕路，都会让你离终局更近一步。
entries.en: Remember this: strength is never given freely. Every pause, every contest, every detour brings you one step closer to the end.

entries.zhHans: 我明白。若终局终究会来，那我至少要以自己的方式走到那里。
entries.en: I understand. If the ending must come, then I will at least reach it on my own terms.

entries.zhHans: 很好。先从眼前这一程开始吧。等你真的走得够远，我们自会再谈更深的事。
entries.en: Good. Then begin with the road before you. When you have truly gone far enough, we will speak of deeper matters.

entries.zhHans: 第二程的敌人不会再像山门外那般散乱。若只凭一口锐气硬闯，很容易被拖进它们熟悉的节奏里。
entries.en: The enemies on the second stretch will not be as scattered as those beyond the gate. If you rush in on resolve alone, they will drag you into a rhythm that favors them.

entries.zhHans: 那就先看清它们的破绽，再决定先斩谁、先留谁。多走一步路，也该多长一分眼力。
entries.en: Then I will read their openings first and decide who falls first and who can be left standing. If I walk one step farther, my judgment should grow with it.

entries.zhHans: 你已经开始明白了。修行路上，真正决定胜负的，往往不是出手有多快，而是你愿不愿意为一次正确的判断多等半息。
entries.en: You are beginning to understand. On the path of cultivation, victory is rarely decided by speed alone, but by whether you are willing to wait half a breath for the right decision.

entries.zhHans: 我能感觉到。若只是更快挥刀，我迟早会撞上比我更快的人；可若我先看懂局势，未必要靠蛮力去赢。
entries.en: I can feel it. If all I do is swing faster, sooner or later I will meet someone faster than me. But if I understand the situation first, I do not always need brute force to win.

entries.zhHans: 山门之外，五行地脉已现紊乱之兆。有人说这是天时将变，也有人说，这是某场更大试炼的前声。你在寿元缓缓流逝的当下启程，所能依靠的，只有尚未磨灭的道心与眼前这条未必正确的路。
entries.en: Beyond the mountain gate, the five elemental veins have already begun to falter. Some call it a shift in heaven's timing, others the prelude to a greater trial. You set out while your lifespan is already slipping away, with only your unbroken resolve and a road that may not be the right one.
